name: Prism Refraction
description: Chromatic aberration / dispersion overlay shader with mouse-controlled prism position producing rainbow edge fringing.
accessibility_notes: decorative overlay — does not affect content readability at default strength

strength.description: Refraction offset strength — higher = more distortion

className.description: CSS class for the container or canvas element

conflicts: WebGL required — no fallback for unsupported browsers
screen blend mode may not work on all backgrounds
